tweet.text: Third-party AI evaluations are crucial for assessing the risks of using AI systems. But we need legal protections, standardized evaluation practices, and better terminology to support them, according to experts from @MIT, @Princeton, and @Stanford. https://stanford.io/3OBgGwt

raw_text.text: Third-party AI evaluations are crucial for assessing the risks of using AI systems. But we need legal protections, standardized evaluation practices, and better terminology to support them, according to experts from @MIT, @Princeton, and @Stanford. https://t.co/zRLb54XpAN

author.name: Stanford HAI
author.description: The official account of the @Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI, advancing AI research, education, policy, and practice to improve the human condition.
